name: alert-normalize-gcp-monitoring
description: Normalize a Cloud Monitoring incident (delivered via the google_cloud Pub/Sub push watch) into the ops-alerts triage store. Emits the __ops_alert__ envelope — dedup on policy+resource so a re-firing condition bumps/reopens one rolling alert instead of creating a row per incident; severity mapped from the alert policy's severity (CRITICAL→critical, ERROR→high, WARNING→medium). Closed-state notifications are skipped by default (INCLUDE_CLOSED). Bind this module to a GCP Monitoring watch channel; triage via list_ops_alerts / correct_ops_alert_severity.

SOURCE_PREFIX.description: Optional prefix for the emitted source label (e.g. 'sandbox-' → 'sandbox-gcp-monitoring')

INCLUDE_CLOSED.description: When true, state=closed notifications are ALSO ingested (they bump the rolling alert and will REOPEN it if an operator already resolved it — usually not what you want). Default skips them; resolve alerts at triage time instead.
